dataset_metadata.name: Samudrika Accuracy Benchmark
dataset_metadata.description: Golden dataset containing 50 diverse palm images with expert-certified interpretations for QA automation.

expert_reading.life_line: Strong and continuous, indicating vitality and a balanced life.
expert_reading.heart_line: Deep and clear, curving towards Jupiter, indicating emotional stability and deep empathy.
expert_reading.career_fate: Straight fate line starting from the base, indicating steady career progression.
expert_reading.wealth: Clear triangle formed by fate, head, and mercury lines, indicating good financial accumulation.

expert_reading.life_line: Noticeable break mid-way suggesting a major life transition or health event, followed by a strong overlapping recovery line.
expert_reading.heart_line: Chained heart line indicating emotional sensitivity and fluctuating relationships.
expert_reading.career_fate: Faint fate line, suggesting a career path driven more by passion than structured ambition.
expert_reading.wealth: Absence of a strong wealth triangle, suggesting fluctuating finances.

expert_reading.life_line: Very faint life line indicating lower physical stamina but high mental energy.
expert_reading.heart_line: Short and faint, ending under Saturn, indicating a pragmatic and somewhat detached approach to emotions.
expert_reading.career_fate: Invisible fate line, common in self-made individuals who forge their own unpredictable path.
expert_reading.wealth: Strong sun line compensating for the lack of fate line, indicating success through fame or public recognition.
